page.primary_keyword: marbella yacht charter october shoulder season
page.title: Marbella Yacht Charter in October: Shoulder Season Deals

data.meta_description: Discover Marbella yacht charter October shoulder season deals. Enjoy warm 22°C days, empty anchorages & up to 12 pax boats from Puerto Banús. Book now.
data.summary: October shoulder season in Marbella offers 22°C days, calm seas and lower rates on luxury yacht charters from Puerto Banús. Our fleet includes Azimut 39, Mangusta 80 and more, with all-inclusive pricing for groups up to 12 guests.
key_facts: October daytime average: 22°C sea temp, 24°C air temp, 8–10 hours of sun.
Sea conditions: calm, low swell (<0.5m), light westerly winds most days.
All charters include licensed skipper, fuel, drinks, snacks, insurance & 21% IVA.
Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) from €749 for 2 hours, €2,299 for 8 hours.
Tier B Mangusta 80 (incl. grey/white variants) from €4,719 minimum 4h, jet ski included.
All boats depart Puerto Banús; reach Marbella Marina in 15 min, Cabopino in 20 min.
Popular October destinations: Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, Estepona, Sotogrande.
No crowds: anchorages and beach clubs are quieter than July–August peak.

faq.q: Is October a good time for a yacht charter in Marbella?
faq.a: Yes. October is shoulder season with 22°C sea temperature, 24°C air, and 8–10 hours of sun. The water is still warm for swimming, anchorages are uncrowded, and rates are lower than summer. Most days have calm seas, making it ideal for cruising the Costa del Sol.

faq.q: Which boats are available for October charters from Puerto Banús?
faq.a: Our full fleet operates year-round from Puerto Banús. Popular October choices include the Azimut 39 (11 pax, €749/2h), Mangusta 80 (12 pax, €4,719/4h with jet ski), and Fairline Targa 12m (10 pax). All depart from Puerto Banús marina.

faq.q: What is included in the charter price?
faq.a: Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs. Tier B boats also include a jet ski.

faq.q: Can we swim and snorkel in October?
faq.a: Absolutely. The sea temperature in October averages 22°C, similar to June. Popular spots like Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the coast near Cabopino offer clear water for swimming, snorkelling, and paddleboarding. We provide snorkel gear on request.

faq.q: How do October prices compare to summer?
faq.a: October is shoulder season, so demand is lower. Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for a full 8-hour day. These rates are typically 15–20% below July–August peak. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

faq.q: What destinations are best in October from Marbella?
faq.a: Calm seas make it easy to reach Estepona (12 NM west), Sotogrande (20 NM west), or Cabopino (8 NM east). For shorter trips, Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés are 20–30 minutes from Puerto Banús. Marbella Marina is 15 minutes east.

faq.q: How many guests can we bring on a charter?
faq.a: Our largest boats, including the Ferretti 94, Canados 86, and Mangusta 80, carry up to 12 guests. The Azimut 39 holds 11, and the Astondoa 40 holds 9. Smaller options like the Mariah SX21 or Speedboat take 5–6 guests. Check the fleet page for exact capacities.

faq.q: How do I book a yacht charter in Marbella for October?
faq.a: Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance for October, though last-minute slots are often available. All charters depart from Puerto Banús. Visit our [homepage](/) to browse the fleet and start your booking.

data.body_html:
October is the sweet spot for a Marbella yacht charter in October — the summer crowds have gone, the sea is still 22°C, and the light is golden over La Concha. Our shoulder season deals make it the most cost-effective time to take a luxury boat out of Puerto Banús, with rates starting at €749 for two hours on an Azimut 39. Whether you want a sunset cruise to Cala del Faro or a full-day run to Estepona, the conditions are calm, the anchorages are quiet, and the value is unmatched.

Why October Works for a Marbella Yacht Charter

October in Marbella delivers 24°C air temperatures, 8–10 hours of daily sunshine, and sea conditions that are flat-calm more often than not. The prevailing westerly breeze stays light (10–15 knots), and swell rarely exceeds half a metre. That means no chop, no white-knuckle rides — just smooth cruising from Puerto Banús to the coves east of Marbella or west to Estepona. The water is warm enough for swimming until late afternoon, and the beaches along the Golden Mile are empty enough that you’ll feel like you have the coast to yourself.

Our October Fleet and Pricing

Every boat in our fleet operates year-round from Puerto Banús. For October, we recommend these options:

BoatLengthMax GuestsOctober PriceInclusions
Astondoa 4012.5m9€749/2h → €2,299/8hSkipper, drinks, snacks, fuel, IVA
Azimut 3912.5m11€749/2h → €2,299/8hSkipper, drinks, snacks, fuel, IVA
Mangusta 80 (White/Grey)24m12€4,719 minimum 4h+ jet ski, skipper, drinks, fuel, IVA
Azimut 58 Flybridge17.6m12On request via WhatsAppSkipper, drinks, snacks, fuel, IVA
Ferretti 9429m12On request via WhatsAppSkipper, drinks, snacks, fuel, IVA

All prices include VAT (21%), licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, and light snacks. No extras, no surprises. For the Mangusta 80, a jet ski is included free for the duration. For other boats (e.g., Pershing 46, Fairline Targa, Canados 86), contact us on WhatsApp for a custom quote.

Best October Destinations from Puerto Banús

With calm seas and shorter daylight (sunset around 19:30), October is perfect for half-day or full-day itineraries. Here are our top picks:

  • Cala del Faro (20 min east) — A quiet cove with clear water, ideal for swimming and snorkelling. Moor up and enjoy the view of Marbella’s coastline.
  • Cala Cortés (30 min east) — A small, sheltered beach near Cabopino. Great for a relaxed lunch stop.
  • Estepona (12 NM west, 1 hour) — The old town marina offers a charming stop for tapas. The sea is usually flat on this route in October.
  • Sotogrande (20 NM west, 1.5 hours) — For a full-day trip, head to the luxury marina; the beach clubs are quieter in October.
  • Marbella Marina (15 min east) — A short hop from Puerto Banús, ideal for a sunset cocktail on the water.

Shoulder Season Deals: What You Save

October demand is lower than July–August, so our Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) are available at €749 for 2 hours — roughly 15% less than peak summer. The full-day rate of €2,299 for 8 hours is a bargain compared to August, when the same charter often exceeds €2,600. For the Mangusta 80, the 4-hour minimum at €4,719 with a jet ski included represents a significant saving versus summer, when the same package can be €5,200+. Other boats are priced on request, but expect similar discounts of 10–20%.

What to Wear and Bring in October

Daytime is warm enough for shorts and a T-shirt, but bring a light jacket or sweater for the evening cruise back to port. The sun is still strong, so sunscreen (SPF 50) and sunglasses are essential. Swimwear and a towel are a must — you’ll want to jump in. If you’re prone to seasickness, note that October seas are generally calm, but a mild antihistamine or ginger tablets are a sensible precaution.

How to Book Your October Yacht Charter

Ready to secure your spot? Contact us on WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We recommend booking at least two weeks ahead for October, though last-minute slots often open up. All charters depart from Puerto Banús, and we’ll meet you at the boat 15 minutes before departure. Browse our full fleet on the [homepage](/) or check the [Marbella yacht charter guide](/blog/) for more tips on planning your trip.

Frequently Asked Questions

Is October a good time for a yacht charter in Marbella?

Yes. October is shoulder season with 22°C sea temperature, 24°C air, and 8–10 hours of sun. The water is still warm for swimming, anchorages are uncrowded, and rates are lower than summer. Most days have calm seas, making it ideal for cruising the Costa del Sol.

Which boats are available for October charters from Puerto Banús?

Our full fleet operates year-round from Puerto Banús. Popular October choices include the Azimut 39 (11 pax, €749/2h), Mangusta 80 (12 pax, €4,719/4h with jet ski), and Fairline Targa 12m (10 pax). All depart from Puerto Banús marina.

What is included in the charter price?

Every charter includes a licensed skipper, fuel, water, soft drinks, beer, white wine, cava, light snacks, insurance, safety equipment, and Spanish IVA (21%). No hidden costs. Tier B boats also include a jet ski.

Can we swim and snorkel in October?

Absolutely. The sea temperature in October averages 22°C, similar to June. Popular spots like Cala del Faro, Cala Cortés, and the coast near Cabopino offer clear water for swimming, snorkelling, and paddleboarding. We provide snorkel gear on request.

How do October prices compare to summer?

October is shoulder season, so demand is lower. Tier A boats (Astondoa 40, Azimut 39) start at €749 for 2 hours or €2,299 for a full 8-hour day. These rates are typically 15–20% below July–August peak. Other boats are priced on request via WhatsApp.

What destinations are best in October from Marbella?

Calm seas make it easy to reach Estepona (12 NM west), Sotogrande (20 NM west), or Cabopino (8 NM east). For shorter trips, Cala del Faro and Cala Cortés are 20–30 minutes from Puerto Banús. Marbella Marina is 15 minutes east.

How many guests can we bring on a charter?

Our largest boats, including the Ferretti 94, Canados 86, and Mangusta 80, carry up to 12 guests. The Azimut 39 holds 11, and the Astondoa 40 holds 9. Smaller options like the Mariah SX21 or Speedboat take 5–6 guests. Check the fleet page for exact capacities.

How do I book a yacht charter in Marbella for October?

Contact us via WhatsApp for availability and pricing. We recommend booking at least 2 weeks in advance for October, though last-minute slots are often available. All charters depart from Puerto Banús. Visit our [homepage](/) to browse the fleet and start your booking.
